data.title: Worldly Launches AI-Powered Solution for Consumer Goods Brands to Reduce Audit Complexity and Supply Chain Risk
data.description: In San Francisco, Worldly, a prominent sustainability and supply chain intelligence platform for consumer goods, revealed its latest innovation - Supplier Compliance Management. This new AI-driven solution empowers consumer goods brands to mitigate risk effectively. By utilizing this tool, brands can streamline social audits and remediation processes, leading to tangible enhancements throughout their supply chains at an accelerated pace. This launch comes at a critical time as businesses face increasing challenges in compliance. Notably, the urgency is underscored by the heightened scrutiny from U.S. Customs and Border Protection.

data.title: Ant Group's Robbyant Unveils LingBot-Map: A Streaming 3D Reconstruction Model for Real-Time Spatial Understanding
data.description: In Shanghai, Robbyant, an embodied AI company under Ant Group, revealed the release of LingBot-Map, a novel streaming 3D reconstruction model. This advancement allows robots, autonomous vehicles, and AR devices to analyze and interpret their 3D environment instantly with just a standard RGB camera. In contrast to conventional methods that handle a batch of images offline, LingBot-Map follows a "see-as-you-go" approach. This technology enhances perception and understanding in real-time without the need for extensive offline processes.

data.title: DeepL unveils real-time spoken translation, breaking the next language barrier with Voice-to-Voice
data.description: DeepL has announced the release of the latest version of its DeepL Translator platform, taking a step further from basic translation services to provide an AI platform seamlessly incorporated into enterprise technology systems. The launch took place in Cologne, Germany on April 16, 2026. Language AI frontrunner DeepL unveiled the new offering, marking a significant advancement in the field.

data.title: JIS Launches New Brand Exposure Program to Elevate Exhibitors and Retailers Across Its Leading Trade Shows
data.description: In Miami on April 16, 2026, JIS introduced the JIS Brand Exposure Program, providing exhibitors and participants with increased media visibility, editorial access, and industry recognition. This new initiative aims to enhance the experience of JIS participants, offering a range of benefits to all involved.

data.title: Mabwell Establishes a Licensing and Commercialization Agreement for Denosumab Biosimilars in Malaysian Market
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Shanghai, Mabwell (Stock Symbol: 688062.SH), a biopharmaceutical company focused on innovation and having a complete industry chain, disclosed a licensing and commercialization deal with a strategic partner in Malaysia.

data.title: Yum China Announces Disclosure under Hong Kong Stock Exchange Rules in Relation to a Possible Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Yum China Holdings, Inc. declared today that it is in accordance with the Rules Governing the Listing of Securities on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited (HKEX) due to the need for advanced disclosure. Yum China is identified by the tickers YUMC on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and 9987 on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX).
Update: Q1 2026 results indicate successful performance as portfolio expansion meets expectations.
Form 8.5 filed for Gamma Communications Plc.

data.title: Got a Layover in Korea? This Clinic Near Incheon Airport Offers Aesthetic Treatments in Under 4 Hours
data.description: REBERRY Clinic, situated in Incheon, South Korea, and specializing in aesthetic treatments tailored for global travelers, has recently inaugurated a new branch on Yeongjong Island. This expansion aims to cater specifically to international clients seeking cosmetic services while visiting the area.

data.title: How China Is Using Copyright to Protect Ancient Kung Fu Traditions
data.description: In Cangzhou, China, efforts are being made to revive its 2,000-year-old Kung Fu heritage along the UNESCO-listed Grand Canal. The city, designated as one of China's earliest "Hometowns of Martial Arts" in 1992, is implementing modern copyright frameworks to protect and promote this ancient tradition.

data.title: Adam Back advises Bitcoin to proactively plan for quantum threat, with optional upgrades for transition to quantum-safe measures when necessary.
data.description: It has been suggested that the most secure strategy is to develop potential upgrades that would enable Bitcoin to transition to quantum-resistant cryptography when necessary.
Auction of mortgage covered bonds (SDRO’s) for refinancing RD Cibor6®, RD Cibor6® Green, FlexKort®, and RD Euribor3®.

data.title: SimCorp appoints Neslihan Yegul to Lead UK & Northern Europe
data.description: With over 20 years of industry expertise, including holding senior positions at S&P Global and Misys, an individual is joining SimCorp to bolster customer connections through digital innovation. The renowned financial technology firm based in London shared this update on April 16, 2026 via PRNewswire.

data.title: CaoCao: Asset Management to Decide Autonomous Driving Race, Targets 100k Driverless Cars by 2030
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on April 16, 2026, CaoCao, a ride-hailing platform supported by Geely Holding, is aiming to position itself as a leading player in the competitive robotaxi sector in the country. Gong Xin, the CEO, revealed in a recent interview that the company's goal is to have 100,000 autonomous vehicles in operation by 2030. This initiative is designed to boost efficiency by enabling comprehensive management of vehicles, technology, and operational aspects.

data.title: Charles Schwab Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE: SCHW) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 16, with analysts predicting earnings of $1.39 per share, up from $1.04 per share a year ago. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue is $6.49 billion, compared to $5.6 billion the previous year. As of February, Charles Schwab reported total client assets amounting to $12.22 trillion. On the day before the earnings announcement, company shares increased by 1.9% to close at $100.27. For more detailed analyst ratings and information, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: GAC Drives Global Growth at the 139th Canton Fair with Three Globalization Strategies
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on April 15, 2026, GAC presented its AION i60, S7, and M8 models at the 139th Canton Fair with the theme "WHERE CRAFT MEETS TECHNOLOGY." These flagship vehicles were highlighted at the event. GAC was the sole automotive brand showcased at the Canton Fair Cuisine Festival, reinforcing its presence with attendees.

data.title: Milesight Marks 15th Anniversary, Reinforces "Build Deep with V.I.R" Strategy
data.description: Celebrating its 15th anniversary on April 16, 2026 in Xiamen, China, Milesight, a leading provider of AI-powered video surveillance solutions, reasserts its enduring strategy under the theme "Build Deep with V.I.R." This milestone signifies the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the dynamic security sector.

data.title: Hannover Messe: TeamViewer highlights Agentless Access and AI-supported maintenance for industrial operations
data.description: In collaboration with Bechtle, a new secure access gateway hardware has been introduced for quick and easy deployment of secure and scalable remote access for industrial systems. This innovative hardware allows for seamless integration of TeamViewer's AI agent Tia with Assist AR, a remote assistance solution, enhancing on-site troubleshooting capabilities. This partnership aims to provide improved efficiency and security for industrial systems.

data.title: Binance Has 'Reached The Scale' Of Major Asian National Commodities Exchanges In Gold Perpetuals Trading, Says Co-CEO Teng
data.description: Binance's co-CEO Richard Teng revealed that the platform's gold perpetual trading volume has reached levels comparable to national commodity exchanges. The growth of perpetual futures for traditional assets like stocks, gold, and silver on crypto exchanges was noted in Binance's research, emphasizing the rapid expansion. Binance holds a significant market share of 41%, leading the way in this sector. According to CoinGecko data, Binance recorded a total perpetual trading volume of $46 billion in the past 24 hours. The gold perpetual volume on crypto exchanges exceeded that of the Dubai Gold & Commodities Exchange and the Multi Commodity Exchange by over two times and four times, respectively.

data.title: Scania expands Services 360 portfolio to include electric and used vehicles
data.description: A comprehensive new program has been launched in Södertälje, Sweden on April 16, 2026, targeting the distinct needs of electric trucks by providing dedicated offerings that encompass various aspects such as batteries. Additionally, a range of repair, maintenance, and productivity coverage options are now accessible for pre-owned combustion engine vehicles. This initiative aims to cater to the diverse requirements of both electric and traditional trucks.
